mlx90614_read_object_temp.tooltip: Reading the object temperature measured by the MLX90614 sensor

mlx90614_read_ambient_temp.tooltip: Reading the ambient temperature measured by the MLX90614 sensor

mlx90614_read_emissivity.tooltip: Read the current emissivity setting of the MLX90614 sensor (0.0-1.0)

mlx90614_write_emissivity.tooltip: Set the radiance value of the MLX90614 sensor (0.0-1.0)
